name: Dark Blue Moon
description:
Welcome to the world of Dark Blue Moon... The ocean!

Dark Blue Moon is a water-based stand whose physical abilities are greater than average, able to control the ocean both in mobility and strength. Able to use his claws to cut the most strongest things in the planet and create whirlpools, Dark Blue Moon can be nearly unstoppable when his opponent is in the water.

You ended up gaining him as a stand after being impaled by a stand arrow, which didn't work at first and nearly killed you. However, he ended up saving you and taking you back to shelter as he wondered about his newest stand user.

(Source: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - Part 3: Stardust Crusaders)
creator: sussus
